tests.title: should return a string of exactly 6 characters

tests.title: should only contain characters from the valid charset (no O, 0, I, 1)

tests.title: should never contain ambiguous characters O, 0, I, 1
tests.fullTitle: generateCode() should never contain ambiguous characters O, 0, I, 1

tests.title: should be uppercase only
tests.fullTitle: generateCode() should be uppercase only
tests.code:
const code = generateCode();
expect(code).to.equal(code.toUpperCase());

tests.title: should generate statistically varied codes (not all the same)

tests.code:

expect(sessions.has(result.code)).to.be.true;

tests.code:
const result = createSession(sessions, "  Rohit  ");
expect(result.leader).to.equal("Rohit");

tests.title: should add the new member to the session members set
tests.fullTitle: joinSession() should add the new member to the session members set
tests.code:
joinSession(sessions, "Bob", "ABCDEF");
expect(sessions.get("ABCDEF").members.has("Bob")).to.be.true;

tests.title: should accept lowercase code and normalize to uppercase
tests.fullTitle: joinSession() should accept lowercase code and normalize to uppercase
tests.code:
const result = joinSession(sessions, "Bob", "abcdef");
expect(result).to.have.property("code", "ABCDEF");
